critic.verdict: A highly repetitive, mechanically copy-pasted chart that completely lacks hold notes and ignores musical phrasing.

issues.problem: The entire drop is mapped as a monotonous, repeating 3-lane stair pattern (NOTE -> BAR -> GAP) on every single quarter beat, completely ignoring the melodic contour and snare backbeats.
The chart contains zero hold notes, missing clear opportunities to map sustained synth pads in both the intro and outro.
The intro relies on a rigid, repeating half-note pattern (BAR -> NOTE -> BAR -> GAP) that feels too mechanical and ignores key synth accents.
The outro cuts off abruptly at 31.19s with a single note, leaving the remaining bars of the outro completely empty.

design_notes: S0 (Intro) introduces the rhythm gently with moderate energy, using a comfortable 2-beat spacing that maps kicks to the center BAR lane and snares to alternating outer lanes. S1 (Drop) features higher musical density, where we double the tap frequency to a clean 1-beat spacing, utilizing fluid left-to-right sweeps across lanes to capture the energetic synth leads. S2 (Outro) provides a satisfying cooldown, returning to the relaxed 2-beat spacing to let the chart breathe as the highway finishes.

design_sections.name: Intro
design_sections.intent: Establish rhythmic pulse with comfortable spacing

design_sections.name: Drop
design_sections.intent: Increase density and utilize left-right motion for the synth lead

design_sections.name: Outro
design_sections.intent: Wind down to a comfortable finish
